ddls:
CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "light_dark" INTEGER /* Lightness level of the color (1 for light, 2 for dark) */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hex code of the color */,
  "rgb_values" TEXT /* RGB values of the color */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color component */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color the component belongs to */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the color component (e.g., red, brown, yellow, white, black) */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the color component in the color */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_components_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the color category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the color category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color classification */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color being classified */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color category the color belongs to */,
  "classification_date" TEXT /* Date the color was classified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color classification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color classification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_classifications_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES color_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_classifications_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product (e.g., furniture, painting) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_colors" (
  "product_color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-color relationship */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color used in the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the color used in the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product-color relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product-color relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_colors_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_colors_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., color analyst, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color usage */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color used in the product */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the color was used in the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the color used in the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color usage was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color usage was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_usage_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_usage_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data for the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_palettes" (
  "palette_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color palette */,
  "palette_name" TEXT /* Name of the color palette */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the color palette */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color palette was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color palette was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("palette_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "palette_colors" (
  "palette_color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each palette-color relationship */,
  "palette_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color palette */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color in the palette */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the palette-color relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the palette-color relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("palette_color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_palette_colors_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_palette_colors_palette_id FOREIGN KEY ("palette_id") REFERENCES color_palettes ("palette_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the product (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
